DELETE FROM businessService WHERE serviceKey IN (SELECT serviceKey FROM businessService WHERE serviceKey IS NOT NULL);
DELETE FROM businessService WHERE serviceKey = (SELECT serviceKey FROM businessService WHERE serviceName = 'TestService' LIMIT 1);
DELETE FROM businessService WHERE serviceKey IN (SELECT serviceKey FROM businessService WHERE serviceKey LIKE 'TestService%');
DELETE FROM businessService WHERE serviceKey IN (SELECT serviceKey FROM businessService b JOIN businessServiceDetails d ON b.serviceKey = d.serviceKey WHERE d.detail = 'TestDetail');
DELETE FROM businessService WHERE serviceKey = ANY (SELECT serviceKey FROM businessService WHERE serviceName IN (SELECT serviceName FROM anotherTable WHERE condition = 'value'));
DELETE FROM businessService WHERE serviceKey IN (SELECT MAX(serviceKey) FROM businessService GROUP BY category HAVING COUNT(*) > 1);
DELETE FROM businessService WHERE serviceKey IN (SELECT serviceKey FROM (SELECT serviceKey FROM businessService WHERE status = 'inactive') AS temp);

DELETE FROM businessService WHERE serviceKey IN (SELECT b.serviceKey FROM businessService b LEFT JOIN businessCategories c ON b.categoryId = c.categoryId WHERE c.categoryName = 'Inactive' AND b.created_at < '2022-01-01');

DELETE FROM businessService WHERE serviceKey IN (SELECT serviceKey FROM (SELECT serviceKey, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY serviceName ORDER BY creationDate DESC) AS rnum FROM businessService) AS ranked WHERE rnum > 1);
DELETE FROM businessService WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM businessServiceDetails d WHERE d.serviceKey = businessService.serviceKey AND d.isActive = 0);
